title: Blockgame Emotes
description: A quality of life mod that adds an emote menu to the chat for Blockgame.
body:
A mod for Blockgame that adds an emote menu to the chat UI, allowing easy use of emotes without needing to remember all of their names.

_This mod is designed for the Blockgame server. It will not work as expected on other servers. If you experience any issues while playing on the Blockgame server, please message @LegacyMelody on Discord_

**This is an unofficial mod for Blockgame, it is not affiliated with PirateSoftware or the Blockgame team**
![The emotes menu added by the mod, embedded into the chat box.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/12ef34e20d092295a93f066edd9dbeb6589d1137_0.webp)
